conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
That's good to know. Can you tell me a bit about what's been going on for you lately? How was your week?
It's just...work has been overwhelming. I mean, we're short-staffed and my workload is piling up. And at home...
I see. That sounds challenging. Have you noticed any changes in your daily routine or habits?
Yeah...I've lost interest in doing things I used to enjoy, like playing guitar.
I'm sorry to hear that. Can you tell me more about what's been going on at work that's causing you stress?
Just the constant feeling of being behind and struggling to keep up. And it's hard to sleep at night...
It sounds like you're really feeling the pressure. Have you noticed any changes in your appetite or eating habits?
Honestly, I've been skipping meals a lot.
Okay. And how about your energy levels? Do you feel like you have the get-up-and-go to do things?
No...I just feel drained all the time.
That can be really tough. What are some things that used to bring you joy or excitement?
Music, I guess. But even listening to music feels like an effort now.
It sounds like you're really struggling to find pleasure in activities. Can you tell me about your social life? Have you been spending time with friends and family?
Yeah...I mean, they're trying to be supportive, but it's hard for them to understand what I'm going through...
That can be tough. Are there any support systems or coping strategies that have worked for you in the past?
Um, well...my colleagues at work are really understanding, and my partner has been trying to help.
That's great to hear. What are some goals you'd like to set for yourself in terms of managing your stress and improving your overall well-being?
Honestly, I just want to be able to enjoy life again...to have the energy to do things without feeling exhausted all the time.
I think that's a great place to start. Can we explore some strategies for helping you get there?
Yeah...I guess so.
Okay. Let's start with small steps and see how we can work together to make progress.
Sounds good, thanks.
You're welcome. What do you think is the most challenging part of your daily routine right now?
Probably just getting out of bed in the morning...feeling like I'm stuck in this rut.
That can be really tough. Have you noticed any physical sensations or body feelings that might be related to these challenges?
Sometimes my back hurts from sitting at a desk all day...
Okay, that's something we can explore further. Are there any recent stressful life events or changes that might have contributed to your current struggles?
I mean...my partner got transferred to another city last month.
That can be tough. How are you coping with the distance?
Honestly, it's been really hard...I just feel like we're drifting apart.
That sounds really painful. Have you thought about what kind of support system or resources you might need to help you cope with this change?
I don't know...I'm trying to figure that out as I go along, I guess.
Okay. What do you think would be the most helpful thing for me to focus on in our next session?
Just getting some strategies to help me manage my stress and improve my sleep, maybe?
Sounds like a great place to start. We can definitely work on that. Is there anything else you'd like to add or discuss before we wrap up today?
No...just thanks for listening, I guess.
You're welcome. Remember, everything we discussed is confidential and just between us.
